name: AUTHZ-004 / ADO-8617
description: A standard user cannot access another tenant's arrangement by ID (IDOR)
descriptionHtml: A standard user cannot access another tenant's arrangement by ID (IDOR)
statusMessage: No cached session for TENANT_B and no WebDriver available. Either run a UI login first, or pre-seed SessionState from CI.
